title: drosera peltata var. genuina
intro: Drosera peltata var. genuina is a species of sundew, a carnivorous plant that obtains essential nutrients by capturing and digesting small insects. Traditionally, Drosera peltata var. genuina has been used in herbal medicine for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to the presence of iridoids and other bioactive compounds, which may also exhibit antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects. Drosera peltata var. genuina is typically used in herbal preparations such as tinctures, teas, and infusions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
